steps.title: Identify the expectation-versus-finding contrast
steps.content: The passage states scientists expected “the marsquakes would originate from all over the planet,” but the data revealed “the marsquakes all started from the same location on the planet.” The passage explicitly calls this contradiction the surprising discovery.

steps.title: Match the actual finding to the answer choices
steps.content:
Choice D directly restates the discovery the passage identifies as surprising — all marsquakes originated from one location, contradicting what scientists expected.

Choices A, B, and C either describe facts not mentioned in the passage or contradict what's stated.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
